name: 7q11_22_ZNF_paralog_cluster
description: 7q11.21-q11.22 ZNF (zinc-finger) gene cluster with multiple KRAB-ZNF paralogs (ZNF92, ZNF273, ZNF735) at ~90-95% identity. Part of the larger genome-wide KRAB-ZNF expansion; contributes to mapping ambiguity but rarely causes clinical CNV.

architecture.internal_structure: Cluster of ~10 KRAB-ZNF genes with shared C-terminal zinc-finger arrays; tandem expansion in primate lineage.

related_diseases: No direct disease; reads from KRAB-ZNF family map ambiguously
